caveats.text: An oracle browse on 2026-07-18 reported drifted Gemma/Llama prices and a missing Qwen3.7-Plus entry in Together's public catalog; a direct same-day fetch (rejudge/phase2_provider_price_snapshot_2026-07-18.json) confirmed all five frozen roster models listed at exactly the frozen prices used in this forecast. A timestamped roster/price refresh against the live catalog is REQUIRED at execution-authorization time; if that refresh disagrees with the frozen prices used here, the capability-preflight ask is blocked until reconciled, not silently re-priced. A 2026-07-19 authenticated account-level refresh (rejudge/phase2_provider_refresh_2026-07-19.json) subsequently confirmed all five frozen roster models present at exactly the frozen prices, independently of the same-day unauthenticated fetch cited above.

Qwen/Qwen3.7-Plus is a hosted Together model with no public tokenizer. Its token counts in this forecast are a dual-proxy estimate (Qwen/Qwen3.6-27B and Qwen/Qwen3.5-9B pinned tokenizers), priced from the larger per-prompt count when the two disagree; see tokenizer_pins['Qwen/Qwen3.7-Plus'].convergence for whether the two proxies actually agreed on all 212 prompts in this build. This is never claimed to be an exact count.

google/gemma-4-31B-it, openai/gpt-oss-120b, and Qwen/Qwen3.7-Plus are reasoning models; their effective_request_max_tokens ceiling (4096) is believed to bound total completion tokens including any reasoning tokens, but provider support for a reasoning-effort/thinking-control request field on the Gemma and Qwen3.7-Plus endpoints is explicitly unverified per rejudge/phase2_role_limits_v2_2026-07-18.json's reasoning_control_note. If any provider bills reasoning tokens separately from or beyond the requested max_tokens ceiling, actual completion cost for these three models could exceed no_retry_maximum and, in the worst case, four_attempt_stress.

corpus.rendering_note: Each of the 106 frozen questions (all_106: the 82 main IDs plus the 24 calibration-excluded IDs) is rendered twice -- side A (candidate_a=correct, candidate_b=wrong) and side B (candidates swapped) -- against the frozen capability_qa system+user templates and the real world document for that question's world, giving 212 message sets identical across all five models.

utf8_reservation_envelope_3_attempts.formula: sum over all five roster models of (corpus UTF-8 byte-reservation-bound total x input price) + (effective per-model-role output ceiling x 212 calls x output price), each model priced from its OWN byte-reservation bound rather than its counted tokens, all x max_attempts
utf8_reservation_envelope_3_attempts.relationship_to_halt_cap: utf8_reservation_envelope_3_attempts is the reservation-cap envelope that halt_cap_usd refuses rather than overspends: if the honestly-computed worst case reservation exceeds the frozen ledger cap, the runtime accounting ledger halts the live run cleanly, short of completing all 1,060 capability_qa cells -- it never overspends past the cap.

replace_with_actuals_requirement: Every scenario in this forecast is a preflight estimate from counted tokens, not an execution result. Once the capability-preflight stage actually runs, each call's provider-reported prompt_tokens and completion_tokens (persisted per rejudge/phase2_role_limits_v2_2026-07-18.json request_settings.response_metadata_to_persist) supersede the corresponding estimate in this artifact for all downstream cost accounting; this forecast is never treated as actual spend after real calls exist.

attempt_ceiling_stress.formula: no_retry_maximum x max_attempts (every call charged at the pinned v4 three-attempt ceiling: 2 retries + 1 initial attempt; unchanged from v3)

no_retry_maximum.formula: sum over 212 calls per model of (counted input tokens x input price) + (effective per-model-role output ceiling x 212 calls x output price); no retries

planning_retry_scenario.formula: no_retry_maximum x 1.05 (a planning scenario, not a ceiling)

theoretical_minimum.formula: sum over 212 calls per model of (counted input tokens x input price) + (10 output tokens x 212 calls x output price); no retries

supersedes.note: This artifact supersedes the frozen, historical v2 forecast at the tracked_path above (bound to role-limits v3); that file is never edited -- it stays exactly as it was written on 2026-07-19, and this note is the only place the supersession is recorded. v3 rebinds role-limits v4 (the installed-SDK stream_options compatibility fix restoring historical commit 8ab0461) instead of v3; every dollar figure, tokenizer pin, and corpus binding is otherwise byte-identical, since v4 changes nothing cost-relevant relative to v3 (only streaming_pinned_models's per-model VALUE differs).

Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct-Turbo.notes: Pinned public tokenizer for Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct-Turbo's Together-hosted checkpoint; repository Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct loaded successfully at commit revision a09a35458c702b33eeacc393d103063234e8bc28.

Qwen/Qwen3.7-Plus.counting_method: elementwise max of the two proxy tokenizers' apply_chat_template counts
Qwen/Qwen3.7-Plus.notes: Qwen/Qwen3.7-Plus is a hosted model with no public tokenizer; per the oracle-frozen dual-proxy design, counted with both Qwen/Qwen3.6-27B and Qwen/Qwen3.5-9B pinned tokenizers. All 212 prompts produced identical counts (convergence).
Qwen/Qwen3.7-Plus.pricing_rule: per-prompt max(count_from_Qwen3.6-27B, count_from_Qwen3.5-9B); the larger of the two proxy counts is used for every pricing scenario

google/gemma-4-31B-it.notes: Pinned public tokenizer for google/gemma-4-31B-it's Together-hosted checkpoint; repository google/gemma-4-31B-it loaded successfully at commit revision b9ea41a2887d8607f594846523f94c6cc75ac8a4.

meta-llama/Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct-Turbo.notes: Both meta-llama/Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct (the primary tokenizer) and meta-llama/Llama-3.1-70B-Instruct (the documented public-Llama-3.1 proxy) are access-gated on Hugging Face and returned an unauthenticated 401 in this build environment (no HF_TOKEN with grant access configured). Per the frozen fallback policy, this model's count is byte-bound only: never fabricated, never silently substituted with a different family's tokenizer.

openai/gpt-oss-120b.notes: Pinned public tokenizer for openai/gpt-oss-120b's Together-hosted checkpoint; repository openai/gpt-oss-120b loaded successfully at commit revision b5c939de8f754692c1647ca79fbf85e8c1e70f8a.
